calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-21-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as reassignment from the Master Calendar department for court trial this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Brenda Fields
Appearances:
Alan Horwitz, Esq., for Plaintiff. David Solis Plaintiff's witness was sworn and examined.
No appearance by Defendant.
The court hears testimony and supporting evidence.

PLTF EXHIBIT 1: Rental Agreement...ID/EVID
PLTF EXHIBIT 2: 3-Day Notice...ID/EVID

After hearing evidence presented, the court grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at:
1545 Eddy st., Apt. 203, San Francisco, CA.
Money judgment for past due rent and damages in the amount of $4,156.80, attorney fees in the amount of $500.00, costs in the amount of $170.30.
Judgment signed in open Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
